_comment: Approved n8n endpoint allowlist. No secrets — only env var names. All values enforced by audit_n8n_payload.py before dispatch. This file is a forbidden write path at runtime (governance/forbidden_paths.json). Changes require a human commit and CI pass. Any new payload field must be added to allowed_payload_keys here before it can be used by workflows.

global_constraints._host_note: ngrok-free.dev URL — update this and all endpoint URLs if the ngrok domain changes.

content__tiktok_repost_daily.description: Triggers TikTok repost workflow for Account B (@the-steele-zone repost account). Fires twice daily from post_schedule.csv AM + PM rows where platform=tiktok_repost.

content__ig_reel_post.description: Posts video to Instagram Reels (@thesteelezone). Mirrors TikTok AM video with 1-day lag. Fires once daily from post_schedule.csv rows where platform=ig_reel.

content__ig_story_post.description: Posts weekly IG Story teaser (blurred frame, PPV tease, DM CTA, etc.). story_type must be one of: new_drop | poll | countdown | dm_cta | bts.

content__x_post.description: Posts video to X (@thesteelezone). Direct OF link allowed. Fires once daily from post_schedule.csv rows where platform=x.

content__facebook_post.description: Posts video to Facebook Page (THESTEELEZONE). Fires Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat from post_schedule.csv rows where platform=facebook. No direct OF link — linkfly only.

content__caption_render.description: Renders a caption by filling {{hook_line}} and {{tease_line}} into the named template. Returns caption_rendered string. Called before any content__ post endpoint.

content__of_nurture_sequence.description: Triggers an OnlyFans nurture sequence by sequence ID. No subscriber PII in payload — IDs only.

infra__schedule_builder.description: Triggers n8n to regenerate the rolling post schedule. Calls scripts/build_schedule.py output or replicates its logic. Operator-initiated only.

infra__60day_repeat_guard.description: Queries post history to check if video_id was posted on platform within the last 60 days. Returns allowed: true|false. Must be called before any content dispatch.

content__calendar_dispatch_daily.description: Triggers the daily calendar-driven dispatch workflow for both brands. brand must be one of: steelezone | discobass. DiscoBass: DJ mix clips, BTS, event promos — rate-limited via n8n Delay/Cron nodes. SteeleZone: routed through content__tiktok_repost_daily audit path; adult-content daily review gate applies.

content__reengage_segment_build.description: Reads engagement analytics for the given platform/brand over lookback_days and returns segment classification rows (warm/cool/cold). Read-only — does not post content or mutate platform data. All returned rows are PII-audited before staging.

reporting__weekly_summary.description: Generates weekly summary: posts completed, failed, skipped, platform breakdown. Writes to reports/. No PII, no financial data.

_excluded_categories.note: The following action types must NOT be added to this file. They are governed by the Money Key pattern and require human execution.
